title: Misty Valley Farm crowned Best Event Venue in Mossel Bay
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Misty Valley Farm is proud...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery\n Sponsored Content","html":"Gallery\n Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Misty Valley Farm is proud to have been voted the Best Event Venue in the 2024 Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards - and it’s easy to see why.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Misty Valley Farm is proud to have been voted the Best Event Venue in the 2024 Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards - and it’s easy to see why."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Just six kilometres outside Hartenbos, this family-friendly destination has become a firm favourite for locals and visitors looking to celebrate life’s special moments."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With both spacious indoor and outdoor facilities, Misty Valley Farm offers the perfect setting for everything from children’s birthday parties to family gatherings, corporate functions, and weddings.","html":"With both spacious indoor and outdoor facilities, Misty Valley Farm offers the perfect setting for everything from children’s birthday parties to family gatherings, corporate functions, and weddings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Their expansive kids’ play areas - complete with jungle gyms, a jumping castle, and plenty of room to run free - make it a stressfree venue for parents and endless fun for children.","html":"Their expansive kids’ play areas - complete with jungle gyms, a jumping castle, and plenty of room to run free - make it a stressfree venue for parents and endless fun for children."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On the food side, Misty Valley never disappoints. Guests can enjoy hearty breakfasts, wood-fired pizzas, juicy burgers, and even vegan options, while the on-site bakery and deli provide freshly baked goods, home-made meals, and farm-fresh favourites.","html":"On the food side, Misty Valley never disappoints. Guests can enjoy hearty breakfasts, wood-fired pizzas, juicy burgers, and even vegan options, while the on-site bakery and deli provide freshly baked goods, home-made meals, and farm-fresh favourites."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The farm’s beautiful views of rolling hills and its welcoming atmosphere create the ideal backdrop for unforgettable celebrations.","html":"The farm’s beautiful views of rolling hills and its welcoming atmosphere create the ideal backdrop for unforgettable celebrations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Open daily and completely cashless, Misty Valley Farm is more than just a venue - it’s a place where memories are made.","html":"Open daily and completely cashless, Misty Valley Farm is more than just a venue - it’s a place where memories are made."},{"type":"list","items":["www.facebook.com/themistyvalleyfarm","066­470 4518"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
